Summary: Verify that app manager should not be able to internally integrate the tenant after a successful integration through Okta or Google SSO
Verify that user's role should be 'End User' after first time log in into Simpplr
Verify that datas of new user in Google admin should be added in simpplr post successful login
Verify that datas of existing users in Google admin should be added in simpplr on successful login
Verify that app manager is able to integrate the tenant with Google SSO
Verify that Google SSO option is available to access for app manager
Verify the validation for number of license of a google SSO integrated tenant
Verify that newly added user should be able to login into Simpplr
Verify that newly added user in Google admin should be displayed to app manager in Simpplr after successful login
Verify that existing users of Google admin should be able to log in Simpplr
Verify that the existing users of Google admin should be visible to app manager in Simpplr on successful login
Verify adding a user in simpplr which is not active
Verify user's login in simpplr after being deleted from google tenant
Verify that users added by the App Manager through Google SSO should be able to login successfully
Verify that Users which are not added to Simpplr by App Manager should receive an error message "User does not exist"
Verify that App Manager is able to add users through "Add New User" feature after Google SSO integration
Verify that tenant without Google SSO integration should be able to access all the intended features without any issues
Verify that App Manager is able to login successfully through Google SSO
Verify that Single SSO is active through either Okta or Google at a time
